column1: # Expected subcellular localizations for secretion-system machinery components.
# Used by the per-system localization-correctness gate (required_fraction_correct):
# for each MacSyFinder-validated SS, the gate compares each component's
# set below; the system is dropped when the fraction matching falls below
# are excluded from the denominator. The literature review behind this file
# is task #58a (2026-06-05); citations are primary structural / topology
#   ss_type                  TXSScan model name (matches ss_components.tsv ss_type col).
#   txsscan_gene_name        TXSScan v2.1 component name from the model XMLs at
#   protein_alias            Common name(s) — informational only, not matched.
#   acceptable_localizations Pipe-separated set in DLP's exact 5-class vocab:
#                              localization is "correct" if it is a member of this set.
#                              An EMPTY value means "no defensible expected
#                              localization": the gate treats this component the
#                              same as a low-DLP-confidence call — excluded from
#                              both the numerator and denominator of fraction-correct.
#   citation_pmid            PubMed ID of the primary citation; empty if none.
#   citation_doi             DOI of the primary citation; empty if none.
#   notes                    One-line caveat or rationale, esp. for borderline cases.
# Localizations track what DLP would call from the static protein sequence
# (not lifecycle-dependent post-secretion compartments — e.g. T6SS Hcp/VgrG
# are listed as Cytoplasmic because DLP scores the pre-firing sequence,
# Comment lines start with '#'; the schema header is the first non-comment line.
